source.title: Angle-resolved optically detected magnetic resonance as a tool for strain determination in nanostructures
source.location: Appendix A, equations A2-A3 and Table II

underlying_cdte_data_source.authors: D. Bagot, R. Granger, S. Rolland
underlying_cdte_data_source.title: Thermal Expansion Coefficient and Bond Strength in Hg1-xCdxTe and Hg1-xZnxTe
underlying_cdte_data_source.reported_scope: thermal expansion variations in Hg1-xCdxTe and Hg1-xZnxTe between 4 and 280 K, including constituent binaries

claim_boundary: The formula and coefficients are reproduced from a secondary article that fitted literature CdTe expansion data. They can test bridge plausibility and source consistency, but cannot close execution provenance until the primary Bagot source, measurement details, and uncertainty are acquired and audited.
